description.en: Complete guide to understanding China fastener supplier price lists. Learn FOB vs CIF pricing, MOQ requirements, bulk discounts, and how to compare quotes from Chinese manufacturers.

description.es: Guía completa para entender las listas de precios de proveedores de tornillería chinos. Aprenda precios FOB vs CIF, requisitos de MOQ, descuentos por volumen y cómo comparar cotizaciones de fabricantes chinos.

description.ja: 中国ファスナーメーカーの価格表を理解するための完全ガイド。FOB価格とCIF価格、MOQ要件、バルク割引、中国製造業者からの見積りの比較方法を学びます。
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden zum Verständnis von Preislisten chinesischer Befestigungsmittel-Lieferanten. Lernen Sie FOB- vs. CIF-Preise, MOQ-Anforderungen, Mengenrabatte und wie Sie Angebote chinesischer Hersteller vergleichen.
description.hi: चीनी फास्टनर आपूर्तिकर्ता मूल्य सूचियों को समझने के लिए पूर्ण गाइड। FOB बनाम CIF मूल्य, MOQ आवश्यकताएं, थोक छूट और चीनी निर्माताओं से उद्धरणों की तुलना कैसे करें सीखें।

keywords: china fastener supplier, fastener price list, FOB price, CIF price, MOQ, bulk fasteners, China manufacturer

body.en: China remains the world's largest fastener producer, manufacturing approximately 40% of global fastener output. Chinese manufacturers offer significant cost advantages, with prices typically 30-50% lower than equivalent products from European or North American suppliers. TradeGo Fasteners, established in 2004, operates ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturing facilities in China, serving clients in 47 countries across Africa, Middle East, and Southeast Asia. Our production capacity exceeds 5,000 metric tons monthly, with the ability to fulfill orders ranging from 1 ton to 500+ tons.

heading.en: FOB vs CIF: Understanding Pricing Terms

body.en:
FOB (Free on Board): The seller delivers goods onto the vessel at the port of export. The buyer bears all costs and risks from that point. FOB is ideal when you have your own shipping arrangements or prefer to control freight logistics directly.

CIF (Cost, Insurance, and Freight): The seller pays for costs, insurance, and freight to deliver goods to the destination port. CIF is convenient when you want a single price covering all delivery costs up to your port of entry.

For Africa-bound shipments, CIF is often preferred as it simplifies customs clearance and reduces logistical complexity. TradeGo offers both FOB and CIF pricing to accommodate different buyer preferences.

Most Chinese fastener manufacturers set MOQs between 1-5 metric tons per order. TradeGo Fasteners offers a competitive MOQ of just 1 metric ton for standard products, making us accessible to smaller importers and distributors. However, unit prices decrease significantly at higher volumes:

Standard MOQ Pricing: $1,200-1,800 per metric ton for common sizes
20-foot Container (20MT): $1,000-1,500 per metric ton - approximately 15-20% savings
Full Truck Load (26MT+): $900-1,300 per metric ton - approximately 20-25% savings

For African distributors serving multiple retail locations, consolidated bulk orders maximize cost savings.

Understanding price variations helps buyers make informed procurement decisions:

1. Material Grade: Carbon steel fasteners range from $800-1,500/MT; stainless steel ranges from $3,000-8,000/MT depending on grade (304, 316)

2. Coating/Finish: Plain (lowest cost) → Zinc plated ($50-150/MT) → Hot-dip galvanized ($150-300/MT) → Dacromet ($400-600/MT)

3. Manufacturing Process: Standard cold-forged ($900-1,200/MT) vs precision machined ($1,500-2,500/MT)

4. Size Range: Common M6-M12 sizes have the most competitive pricing due to high production volumes. Non-standard sizes or large diameters (M24+) command premium pricing.

5. Steel Material Costs: Hot-rolled coil prices fluctuate based on global commodity markets, typically $500-700/MT for commodity grades.

Before committing to bulk orders, buyers should verify product quality. TradeGo offers sample orders at nominal cost, typically $50-200 depending on product complexity and quantity. Sample orders allow buyers to conduct:

Physical inspection of thread quality and dimensional accuracy
Coating thickness and corrosion resistance testing
Pull-out strength verification for intended applications
Comparison with specifications from current suppliers

Sample lead time is typically 5-7 days, with shipping via express courier (DHL, FedEx) for rapid delivery. We recommend ordering samples of 3-5 product types representing the bulk of your planned purchase.

heading.en: How to Request a Price Quote

body.en:
To receive an accurate price quote from TradeGo Fasteners, provide:

1. Product specifications (type, size range, standard - DIN/ANSI/ISO)
2. Required quantities per product type (in metric tons)
3. Destination port or country
4. Preferred incoterm (FOB, CIF, DDP)
5. Required certifications (ISO, SABS, SGS if needed)
6. Target delivery date

Contact us via WhatsApp for immediate response during business hours (UTC+8). We typically respond to quote requests within 2-4 hours during weekdays. For container-scale orders (20MT+), we can provide detailed quotations within 24 hours.
